road-to-ewc-dreamhack-birmingham-2026.name: Road to EWC: DreamHack Birmingham 2026
road-to-ewc-dreamhack-birmingham-2026.location: Pendigo Way, Marston Green, Birmingham B40 1NT, Wielka Brytania
road-to-ewc-dreamhack-birmingham-2026.description: Road to EWC: DreamHack Birmingham 2026 is scheduled for Mar 27-30, 2026 in Pendigo Way, Marston Green, Birmingham B40 1NT, Wielka Brytania. Featuring Street Fighter 6. Registered top players include GO1, NoahTheProdigy, Mister Crimson, Nephew, Kusanagi, Armperor.

voltagecup-2026.name: VOLTAGECUP 2026
voltagecup-2026.location: 日本、〒730-0811 広島県広島市中区中島町１−５ 3階
voltagecup-2026.description: VOLTAGECUP 2026 is scheduled for Mar 28-29, 2026 in 日本、〒730-0811 広島県広島市中区中島町１−５ 3階. Featuring Street Fighter 6. Registered top players include Fuudo, Tokido, Higuchi, kincho, kingsvega, eguto.

blink-respawn-m-xico-2026.name: BLINK RESPAWN MÉXICO 2026
blink-respawn-m-xico-2026.location: Av. Morelos 67, Juárez, Cuauhtémoc, 06600 Ciudad de México, CDMX, Mexico
blink-respawn-m-xico-2026.description: BLINK RESPAWN MÉXICO 2026 is scheduled for Apr 11, 2026 in Av. Morelos 67, Juárez, Cuauhtémoc, 06600 Ciudad de México, CDMX, Mexico. Featuring Street Fighter 6. Registered top players include Uriel Velorio.

edinbrawl-v.name: EDINBRAWL V
edinbrawl-v.description: EDINBRAWL V is scheduled for Apr 11, 2026 in 20 North Bridge, Edinburgh EH1 1TR, UK. Featuring Street Fighter 6. Registered top players include MysticSmash.

evo-japan-2026.name: Evo Japan 2026
evo-japan-2026.description: Evo Japan 2026 is scheduled for May 1-3, 2026 in 3-chōme-11-1 Ariake, Koto City, Tokyo 135-0063, Japan. Featuring Street Fighter 6. Registered top players include Blaz, Sahara., Fuudo, xiaohai, kilzyou, Punk.
